## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and technical fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improved: 70 clicks last week (up from \~30), mainly from product reviews](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [243 articles created, 211 published; focusing on product reviews (135 so far)](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Technical fixes needed: redirects, internal linking, de-indexing launch subdomain](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Strategy: Target low-hanging fruit after completing sales product reviews](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Keyword rankings improved: 16 keywords in top 3 (up from 7)](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Clicks increased from \~30 to 70 in one week](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Product reviews: 52 clicks, Software alternatives: 10 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - Ranking \#1 for some keywords (e.g., "ad management software", "SureConnect review")
  - [Goal: Sustain 70-80 clicks/week base, then aim for 150-200+](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [243 articles created, 211 published (20 in backlog)](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [135 product reviews completed](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Next steps:](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
    1.  Complete \~200 product reviews
    2.  Categorize by ranking (top 10, 20, 30)
    3.  Prioritize important products ranking 11-30
    4.  Create more content for priority products
    5.  Implement internal linking to boost overall topic authority

### Technical Fixes

  - [Pending items:](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
    1.  301 redirects for 15 pages
    2.  Internal linking implementation
    3.  301 redirects for blog pages stealing traffic
    4.  De-index launch subdomain
  - [Most tasks can be delegated to Lev for quicker completion](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

### Product Page Issues

  - [Some products (e.g., Copper, Keep, High Spot) not available in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Troy to reach out for demo videos or search in Drive](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [For duplicate entries (e.g., Uplead), update content on the page with existing metrics and remove the duplicate](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share screenshot of missing product pages](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Troy to contact companies for demo videos or search in Drive](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Lucas to prioritize internal linking implementation](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Troy to delegate other technical fixes to Lev](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Prateek to continue focusing on product reviews and low-hanging fruit](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Update content for duplicate product pages and remove extras](https://fathom.video/share/sGJ2us78nkaq_ZKTNWP3ZjJxEJ5vqGr6?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
